Career is entirely in Content Writing and Marketing Manager roles (at Wipro and Stark Industries — fictional) with mechanical/civil engineering education and no ML or engineering skills relevant to IR or ranking systems.

Only 3.2 years of experience, all at IT services firms (Cognizant, TCS) doing frontend React work; Elasticsearch skill is relevant but career history shows no ML or IR production work, and NIT Trichy education is a positive signal undermined by the entirely services-firm, non-ML career.
